agents.name: Triage Agent
agents.description: Checks if the raised defect is an issue / feature and lists the impacted objects and / or updates the story with the analysis.

agents.name: Design Agent
agents.description: Designs the best way to fix / enhance the story and provides spec.

agents.name: Data Product Agent
agents.description: Defines the parameters / metadata for a data product.

agents.name: Data modelling Agent
agents.description: Models the data into either data vault and / or dimensional modelling.

agents.name: Lineage Agent
agents.description: Creates details lineage report of the impacted objects (tables / code / jobs).

agents.name: Impact Analysis Agent
agents.description: Creates detailed impact analysis, forward and backward.

agents.name: SQL Agent
agents.description: Modifies / creates SQL scripts based on the spec.

agents.name: Python Agent
agents.description: Modifies / creates Python scripts based on the spec.

agents.name: Stored Proc Agent
agents.description: Modifies / creates stored procedures in Snowflake based on the spec.

agents.name: Scheduler Agent
agents.description: Modifies / creates the Korous schedule based on the spec.

agents.name: Code Refactor Agent
agents.description: Refactors code based on the standards.

agents.name: Unit Test Agent
agents.description: Creates unit test cases based on the spec and code.

agents.name: Regression Test Agent
agents.description: Identifies all the unit test cases for that particular code and updates the catalog for future regression suite.

agents.name: SQL Optimizer Agent
agents.description: Scans the code and optimizes the SQL for Snowflake execution by simulating and providing the optimzed parameters.

agents.name: Sonar Remediation Agent
agents.description: Scans the code for 132 rules used by Sonar and fixes the code agianst those rules.

agents.name: Code Quality Agent
agents.description: Scans the code for all quality / best practises and fixes the code.

agents.name: Code Review Agent
agents.description: Reviews the code against the standards / best practises and provides the report / fix the code.

agents.name: Governance & Security Agent
agents.description: Scans the code for any security / governance violations and provides report / fix the code.
